description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish elephant, with a soft, rounded body and exaggerated features. The elephant is primarily light gray with large, expressive blue eyes and prominent pink inner ears. Its trunk is extended forward, and it has two white tusks protruding from either side of the trunk. The left side of the body is inscribed with the name 'Jette', while the right side bears the word 'Mormor', both in a decorative script. The toy's surface appears velvety and matte, with subtle seams visible along the limbs and head. The overall appearance is friendly and inviting, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A soft, light gray plush elephant toy with large blue eyes, pink inner ears, and the names 'Jette' and 'Mormor' inscribed on its sides. The toy has a friendly, cartoonish appearance with a velvety matte finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the rounded back, hind legs, and the back of the head and ears, with no inscriptions visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the name 'Jette' inscribed on the body, the left ear, and the extended trunk and tusks.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the large blue eyes, pink inner ears, extended trunk, and both tusks, giving a full view of the face.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the name 'Mormor' inscribed on the body, the right ear, and the trunk and tusks.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and inviting, with wide, open blue eyes and a slight upward curve to the mouth area, giving a gentle and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the trunk extended forward and the head slightly raised, ears spread outward.
